name: Crockpot Chicken & Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet.
2. Saute onion and garlic until light brown. Remove from skillet.
3. Add sausage and chicken to the skillet and brown them.
4. Drain excess fat and pat dry.
5. In the crockpot, combine all remaining ingredients with onions and garlic.
6. Add sausage then top with chicken breasts.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 6-8 hours.
